title: AI-UI Component Types for json-render Integration
purpose: Defines all 22 UI components used in the AI-powered UI system with their props and types for integration with json-render schema.
module_context: Exports interfaces for 22 UI components organized into 5 categories: Input, Data Display, Interactive, Layout, and Mermaid Integration. Also exports union types for component groups and MCP tool parameters for UI rendering and updates.

steps.content: Check if the provided component type exists in the list of all valid component names.
Return true if the type is found in the catalog, false otherwise.
